# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

properties([
    parameters([
        string(name: 'BUILD_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No build command specified"', description: 'Command to build the project'),
        string(name: 'TEST_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No test command specified"', description: 'Command to run tests'),
        string(name: 'DEPLOYMENT_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No deployment command specified"', description: 'Command to deploy the project'),
        string(name: 'PRE_BUILD_COMMAND', defaultValue: '', description: 'Command to run before build (optional)'),
        string(name: 'POST_BUILD_COMMAND', defaultValue: '', description: 'Command to run after build (optional)'),
        string(name: 'PRE_TEST_COMMAND', defaultValue: '', description: 'Command to run before tests (optional)'),
        string(name: 'POST_TEST_COMMAND', defaultValue: '', description: 'Command to run after tests (optional)'),
        string(name: 'PRE_DEPLOYMENT_COMMAND', defaultValue: '', description: 'Command to run before deployment (optional)'),
        string(name: 'POST_DEPLOYMENT_COMMAND', defaultValue: '', description: 'Command to run after deployment (optional)'),
        string(name: 'CLEANUP_COMMAND', defaultValue: '', description: 'Command to run for cleanup (optional)'),
        choice(name: 'SKIP_BUILD', choices: ['false', 'true'], description: 'Skip build stage?'),
        choice(name: 'SKIP_TESTS', choices: ['false', 'true'], description: 'Skip test stage?'),
        choice(name: 'SKIP_DEPLOYMENT', choices: ['false', 'true'], description: 'Skip deployment stage?'),
        string(name: 'WORKING_DIRECTORY', defaultValue: '.', description: 'Working directory for commands'),
        string(name: 'ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES', defaultValue: '', description: 'Environment variables (KEY=VALUE, separated by semicolons)'),
        string(name: 'BUILD_TIMEOUT', defaultValue: '30', description: 'Build timeout in minutes'),
        string(name: 'TEST_TIMEOUT', defaultValue: '30', description: 'Test timeout in minutes'),
        string(name: 'DEPLOYMENT_TIMEOUT', defaultValue: '30', description: 'Deployment timeout in minutes'),
        choice(name: 'SHELL_TYPE', choices: ['sh', 'bash', 'zsh'], description: 'Shell interpreter to use'),
        text(name: 'ADDITIONAL_COMMANDS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Additional commands to run (one per line, executed after deployment)')
    ])
])

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    environment {
        CUSTOM_ENV_VARS = "${params.ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES}"
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Setup Environment') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "========== Pipeline Configuration =========="
                    echo "Working Directory: ${params.WORKING_DIRECTORY}"
                    echo "Shell Type: ${params.SHELL_TYPE}"
                    echo "Skip Build: ${params.SKIP_BUILD}"
                    echo "Skip Tests: ${params.SKIP_TESTS}"
                    echo "Skip Deployment: ${params.SKIP_DEPLOYMENT}"
                    echo "==========================================="
                    
                    if (params.ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES?.trim()) {
                        echo "Setting custom environment variables..."
                        def envVars = params.ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES.split(';')
                        envVars.each { envVar ->
                            if (envVar.trim()) {
                                def parts = envVar.split('=', 2)
                                if (parts.length == 2) {
                                    env."${parts[0].trim()}" = parts[1].trim()
                                    echo "Set ${parts[0].trim()}"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Pre-Build') {
            when {
                expression { params.PRE_BUILD_COMMAND?.trim() && params.SKIP_BUILD == 'false' }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "========== Executing Pre-Build Command =========="
                    dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY) {
                        executeCommand(params.PRE_BUILD_COMMAND, params.SHELL_TYPE)
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Build') {
            when {
                expression { params.SKIP_BUILD == 'false' }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "========== Executing Build Command =========="
                    timeout(time: params.BUILD_TIMEOUT.toInteger(), unit: 'MINUTES') {
                        dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY) {
                            executeCommand(params.BUILD_COMMAND, params.SHELL_TYPE)
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Post-Build') {
            when {
                expression { params.POST_BUILD_COMMAND?.trim() && params.SKIP_BUILD == 'false' }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "========== Executing Post-Build Command =========="
                    dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY) {
                        executeCommand(params.POST_BUILD_COMMAND, params.SHELL_TYPE)
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Pre-Test') {
            when {
                expression { params.PRE_TEST_COMMAND?.trim() && params.SKIP_TESTS == 'false' }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "========== Executing Pre-Test Command =========="
                    dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY) {
                        executeCommand(params.PRE_TEST_COMMAND, params.SHELL_TYPE)
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Test') {
            when {
                expression { params.SKIP_TESTS == 'false' }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "========== Executing Test Command =========="
                    timeout(time: params.TEST_TIMEOUT.toInteger(), unit: 'MINUTES') {
                        dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY) {
                            executeCommand(params.TEST_COMMAND, params.SHELL_TYPE)
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Post-Test') {
            when {
                expression { params.POST_TEST_COMMAND?.trim() && params.SKIP_TESTS == 'false' }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "========== Executing Post-Test Command =========="
                    dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY) {
                        executeCommand(params.POST_TEST_COMMAND, params.SHELL_TYPE)
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Pre-Deployment') {
            when {
                expression { params.PRE_DEPLOYMENT_COMMAND?.trim() && params.SKIP_DEPLOYMENT == 'false' }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "========== Executing Pre-Deployment Command =========="
                    dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY) {
                        executeCommand(params.PRE_DEPLOYMENT_COMMAND, params.SHELL_TYPE)
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deployment') {
            when {
                expression { params.SKIP_DEPLOYMENT == 'false' }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "========== Executing Deployment Command =========="
                    timeout(time: params.DEPLOYMENT_TIMEOUT.toInteger(), unit: 'MINUTES') {
                        dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY) {
                            executeCommand(params.DEPLOYMENT_COMMAND, params.SHELL_TYPE)
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Post-Deployment') {
            when {
                expression { params.POST_DEPLOYMENT_COMMAND?.trim() && params.SKIP_DEPLOYMENT == 'false' }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "========== Executing Post-Deployment Command =========="
                    dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY) {
                        executeCommand(params.POST_DEPLOYMENT_COMMAND, params.SHELL_TYPE)
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Additional Commands') {
            when {
                expression { params.ADDITIONAL_COMMANDS?.trim() }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "========== Executing Additional Commands =========="
                    def commands = params.ADDITIONAL_COMMANDS.split('\n')
                    commands.eachWithIndex { cmd, index ->
                        if (cmd.trim()) {
                            echo "Executing additional command ${index + 1}..."
                            dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY) {
                                executeCommand(cmd, params.SHELL_TYPE)
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Cleanup') {
            when {
                expression { params.CLEANUP_COMMAND?.trim() }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "========== Executing Cleanup Command =========="
                    dir(params.WORKING_DIRECTORY) {
                        executeCommand(params.CLEANUP_COMMAND, params.SHELL_TYPE)
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        success {
            echo "Pipeline completed successfully!"
        }
        failure {
            echo "Pipeline failed!"
        }
        always {
            echo "Pipeline execution finished."
        }
    }
}

def executeCommand(String command, String shellType) {
    if (isUnix()) {
        if (shellType == 'bash') {
            sh """#!/bin/bash
                set -e
                ${command}
            """
        } else if (shellType == 'zsh') {
            sh """#!/bin/zsh
                set -e
                ${command}
            """
        } else {
            sh """
                set -e
                ${command}
            """
        }
    } else {
        bat """
            ${command}
        """
    }
}
